hero.subtitle: Sona reads every customer email, looks up the order in your store, and drafts the right reply in your brand voice — ready for one-click approval.
hero.emailError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
hero.emailSuccess: Thanks! We'll email you as soon as we open more spots.

problem.title: The same questions. Every single day.
problem.card1Body: A handful of questions make up most of your inbox, and every one still means digging through your store to answer.
problem.card2Body: People expect an answer in minutes. Manual lookups make them wait hours — and email again while they wait.
problem.card3Body: Old-school bots reply with canned text. They can't check an order, issue a refund, or fix an address.
problem.card4Title: Your best answers aren't written down
problem.card4Body: How you handle each case lives in one person's head — so it can't scale, and it walks out the door when they do.

how.title: Live in three steps
how.step1Body: Link your webshop and support email. No migration — Sona works alongside what you already have.
how.step2Body: Import your policies, FAQ and past tickets. Sona learns your products, rules and tone of voice.
how.step3Body: Start by approving every draft. Put ticket types on autopilot as trust grows.

dives.aBody: Import return policies, shipping rules, FAQs and past tickets. Every answer is grounded in your shop's own knowledge — and cites the source it's based on, so you can verify at a glance.
dives.aPoint1: Answers cite the exact policy they rely on
dives.aPoint2: Import from Zendesk, documents or your website
dives.aPoint3: Sona asks instead of guessing when knowledge is missing
dives.bBody: Refunds, exchanges, address changes, cancellations — Sona prepares the action alongside the reply, and executes it in your store the moment you approve. Not promised in text. Done.
dives.bPoint1: Refunds and exchanges executed in your store
dives.bPoint2: Address changes caught before the parcel ships
dives.bPoint3: Every action requires your explicit approval

languages.title: Every language, your voice
languages.body: Your customers write in their language. Sona replies in it — same tone, same policies, no translation round-trips.

control.title: You decide how much Sona does
control.subtitle: Set it per ticket type. Start with drafts you approve, and switch on autopilot only where the results say you're ready.
control.mode1Body: Sona stays out of it. Your team writes and sends the reply.
control.mode2Body: Sona drafts the reply with live order data and cited sources. You approve before anything sends.
control.mode3Body: For ticket types you trust, Sona sends the reply and takes the action on its own.

pricing.title: Simple pricing that grows with you
pricing.subtitle: Every plan includes all features and unlimited users. No binding — month to month.
pricing.pilotNote: Every plan starts with a guided pilot.
pricing.enterprise: More than 5,000 tickets a month? Talk to us.

integrations.title: Works with the tools you already use

faq.title: Questions, answered
faq.q1: Will my customers know it's AI?
faq.a1: Replies go out from your own support address, in your tone of voice, and you approve them before they're sent. Whether you disclose AI involvement is your choice — Sona works either way.
faq.q2: What happens when Sona doesn't know the answer?
faq.a2: Sona flags the ticket for you instead of guessing. Unanswered questions become suggestions for your knowledge base, so coverage grows over time.
faq.q3: Do I have to switch helpdesk?
faq.a3: No. Sona works on top of your existing support email — you can keep your current setup and workflows.
faq.a4: Connecting your store and email takes minutes. Teaching Sona your policies is a guided step — most shops see their first quality drafts the same day.
faq.q5: What about GDPR and my customers' data?
faq.a5: Customer data is processed only to answer their tickets, stored in the EU, and never used to train models for other companies.
faq.a6: A customer conversation, however many emails it takes. Automated notifications and spam don't count.

finalCta.title: Ready to take support off your plate?
finalCta.subtitle: Book a 20-minute demo — we'll show Sona answering tickets like yours.

demo.title: See Sona in action
demo.subtitle: A short walkthrough: Sona reads a ticket, finds the order in your store, and drafts the reply you approve — end to end.
demo.placeholderBody: We're putting the finishing touches on it. In the meantime, book a live demo and we'll walk you through Sona on your own tickets.

trust.title: New — and hands-on with every store
trust.body: Sona is early, and that's the point. We work directly with each store we onboard, so setup isn't a ticket queue — it's the people who built Sona helping you get your first great drafts.
trust.pillar1Body: Until you switch on autopilot, every reply is yours to send.
trust.pillar2Body: Sona's app and database run in the EU, and customer data is used only to answer tickets.
trust.pillar3Body: You get the people who built Sona on setup — not a support queue.

security.title: Security & data
security.subtitle: How Sona handles your customers' data — and why you stay in control of it.
security.p1Body: Sona's app and database run in the EU (DigitalOcean and Supabase).
security.p2Body: A customer's data is used to draft replies to their own tickets — nothing else.
security.p3Title: Not used to train AI models
security.p3Body: Replies are drafted with OpenAI's API. Content sent to the API is not used to train OpenAI's models.
security.p4Body: Nothing reaches a customer without your approval, until you turn on autopilot per ticket type.
security.p5Body: Sona connects to your store and inbox with the access it needs to do the job, and no more.
security.subTitle: Sub-processors
security.subIntro: The services that help us run Sona and process data on our behalf.
security.aiNote: To draft replies, ticket content is sent to OpenAI's API (United States). OpenAI does not use data submitted through its API to train its models.
security.note: We're working toward formal certifications. Have specific compliance requirements? Talk to us.

integrationsPage.title: Integrations
integrationsPage.subtitle: Sona works on top of the tools you already use — no migration required.
integrationsPage.shopifyBody: Read live order, fulfilment and customer data, and take actions like refunds and address changes.
integrationsPage.emailBody: Forward your support inbox to Sona — it works alongside your existing email, no new helpdesk to learn.
integrationsPage.zendeskBody: Import your past tickets so Sona learns how your team already answers.
integrationsPage.wooBody: Live order and customer data for WooCommerce stores.
integrationsPage.magentoBody: Live order and customer data for Magento stores.
integrationsPage.moreBody: More e-commerce, email and helpdesk connections are on the way.
